name: Kahlua Chocolate Strawberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chocolate chips in the top of a double boiler set over simmering water.
2. Melt the chocolate, stirring occasionally until smooth.
3. Remove the double boiler from heat and add the sweetened condensed milk.
4. Stir to combine.
5. Add the Kahlua and whisk until well blended.
6. Allow the mixture to cool for about 1 hour or until it thickens.
7. Once cooled, hand dip strawberries into the chocolate sauce.
8. Refrigerate up to 4 hours before serving. Enjoy chilled.
9. Alternatively, serve at room temperature and allow guests to dip their own strawberries.
